name: agent-engineering-toolkit

scripts.contracts:check: npm run check -w @agent-toolkit/contracts && npm run build -w @agent-toolkit/contracts && npm run check -w @agent-toolkit/fullstack-client
scripts.job:verify: npm run check -w @agent-toolkit/job-contracts && npm run build -w @agent-toolkit/job-contracts && node tools/job-contract-check/scripts/check.mjs && node apps/ai-workflow-reference/scripts/check-structure.mjs
scripts.fullstack:verify: npm run contracts:check && npm run mobile:verify && npm run job:verify && npm run build -w @agent-toolkit/fullstack-client && node tools/contract-check/scripts/check.mjs && node tools/fullstack-audit/scripts/audit.mjs && npm run check -w @agent-toolkit/nextjs-fullstack-app && npm run build -w @agent-toolkit/nextjs-fullstack-app && npm run check -w @agent-toolkit/nextjs-dotnet-frontend && npm run build -w @agent-toolkit/nextjs-dotnet-frontend && dotnet build apps/nextjs-dotnet-app/backend/src/Web/NextjsDotnetApp.Web.csproj

description: Agent Engineering OS with installable runtime governance CLI
